title: Japanese Robata Beef Skewers
description: Delicate beef fillet marinated in a sweet and savory mix, grilled to perfection on a robata grill. Serve with a side of ssizzle to add an extra crunch.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sake, and velvety honey to make the marinade.
Add the beef cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the robata grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Grill the beef skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and sprinkle with flaky sea salt to taste.
Garnish with ssizzle and serve immediately.
